author: sleepyhauru
name: linkedin
short: Translate text into LinkedIn Speak using Kagi Translate.
description: A Red DiscordBot cog that uses Kagi Translate's LinkedIn Speak mode through the translate endpoint and SSE streaming responses. Supports direct text input or replying to a message with !linkedin.
install_msg: Thanks for installing linkedin. Configure it with `[p]linkedinset setkagi <value>` and `[p]linkedinset settranslate <value>` before using `[p]linkedin`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Kagi session values in Red's config for authentication and sends command text to Kagi Translate.
